tooltip.daysgoby.xian_sword.pressure: Pressure: attacks treat armor as zero and punish low-armor targets with reversed mitigation.
tooltip.daysgoby.xian_sword.dangmo: Dangmo: first strike against undead deals bonus true damage based on max health.
tooltip.daysgoby.xian_sword.guard: Guarding Sword-Shield: offhand stance rotates between sword and shield defense windows.
tooltip.daysgoby.xian_sword.active: Myriad Swords Return: right click spends Xian Qi, sneak-right-click spends Mo Qi and pierces targets in the beam.
message.daysgoby.xian_sword.no_target: Myriad Swords Return needs a target
actionbar.daysgoby.wanderlust.new_biome_: You discover a biome new to today
You discover a biome new to you
message.daysgoby.wanderlust.lottery_unav: The journey prize pool is unavailable
message.daysgoby.wanderlust.inventory_fu: Not enough inventory space to continue drawing
Stopped early because your inventory is full
daysgoby.configuration.title: Days go by Configuration
daysgoby.configuration.toughAsNailsCompa: Manage compatibility features for Tough As Nails. Automatically disabled when Tough As Nails is missing.
Disabling this also turns off the compatibility features in this section.
daysgoby.configuration.armorLining.toolt: Enable armor lining compat. Disabling it turns off lining recipes and the temperature bonus.
daysgoby.configuration.enchantment.toolt: Enable this mod's enchantment module. Disabling it turns off the enchantments and their acquisition sources.
daysgoby.configuration.specialWeapon.too: Enable the special weapon module. Disabling it also disables that module's crafting recipes.
daysgoby.configuration.enchantments.tool: Control each enchantment, its acquisition sources, and any extra behavior settings.
Disables the enchantment and all of its acquisition sources.
daysgoby.configuration.shitRain.inEnchan: Allow Shit Rain to appear in the enchanting table.
daysgoby.configuration.shitRain.onRandom: Allow Shit Rain to generate from random enchanted-book loot and similar sources.
daysgoby.configuration.shitRain.tradeabl: Allow Shit Rain to appear in villager enchanted-book trades.
daysgoby.configuration.shitRain.onTraded: Allow Shit Rain to appear on pre-enchanted traded equipment.
daysgoby.configuration.shitRain.onMobSpa: Allow Shit Rain to appear on naturally spawned mob equipment.
daysgoby.configuration.shitRain.affected: Leave empty to affect all non-boss mobs; once populated, only listed entity ids are affected.
daysgoby.configuration.timeStop.tooltip: A chestplate control enchantment. Levels I/II freeze the attacker after a hit, while level III auto-triggers a single-target or area stop when hostile intent locks on.
Disables the enchantment and all of its acquisition sources.
daysgoby.configuration.timeStop.inEnchan: Allow Time Stop to appear in the enchanting table.
daysgoby.configuration.timeStop.onRandom: Allow Time Stop to generate from random enchanted-book loot and similar sources.
daysgoby.configuration.timeStop.tradeabl: Allow Time Stop to appear in villager enchanted-book trades.
daysgoby.configuration.timeStop.onTraded: Allow Time Stop to appear on pre-enchanted traded equipment.
daysgoby.configuration.timeStop.onMobSpa: Allow Time Stop to appear on naturally spawned mob equipment.
daysgoby.configuration.timeStop.fieldRad: Radius used when Time Stop III triggers the area freeze field.
daysgoby.configuration.timeStop.cooldown: How many seconds the same wearer must wait before Time Stop can trigger again.
daysgoby.configuration.wanderlust.toolti: Enable the travel and exploration module.
daysgoby.configuration.scoring.tooltip: Rules that decide how journey score is earned.
daysgoby.configuration.chunksPerPoint.to: How many unique daily chunks are needed for one journey point.
daysgoby.configuration.dailyBiomeScore.t: Points for the first visit to a biome each day.
daysgoby.configuration.lifetimeBiomeBonu: Extra points for the first biome discovery in a player's lifetime.
daysgoby.configuration.dailyStructureSco: Points for the first discovery of a structure each day.
daysgoby.configuration.ignoreHiddenStruc: Skip structures tagged as hidden from displayers or locator selection.
daysgoby.configuration.goals.tooltip: Thresholds for daily completion and reward tiers.
daysgoby.configuration.dailyGoalScore.to: Journey score required to complete the daily goal.
daysgoby.configuration.tier1Score.toolti: Score required for the first reward tier.
daysgoby.configuration.tier2Score.toolti: Score required for the second reward tier.
daysgoby.configuration.tier3Score.toolti: Score required for the third reward tier.
daysgoby.configuration.effectDurationSec: How many seconds reward effects are refreshed for after gaining score.
daysgoby.configuration.lottery.tooltip: Settings for issuing and spending journey tickets in the travel journal.
daysgoby.configuration.enableJournalLott: When disabled, the journal still records travel but tickets cannot be spent on draws.
daysgoby.configuration.ticketPerDailyGoa: How many journey tickets the player gains the first time they complete the daily goal each day.
daysgoby.configuration.lotteryCostPerDra: How many journey tickets each draw costs.
daysgoby.configuration.dropRewardsIfInve: When inventory space runs out, drop remaining draw rewards at the player's feet.
